title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 19 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/09/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 1.4% today, the main contract closed 705.5. Some traders were general attitude to sell. More steel millstended to wait and see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
